commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Kings. Ithobaal (Josephus, Antiquities x. 11.) had many governors under him. Nabuchodonosor besieged Tyre for 13 years, Ezechiel xxvi.
Sea, or Gibraltar. See Jos. sup. v. 22. (Haydock) He had navies on the Mediterranean, Ezechiel xxx. 9.
